name: Consolidated Edison Inc
description: Consolidated Edison, Inc., commonly known as Con Edison (stylized as conEdison) or ConEd, is one of the largest investor-owned energy companies in the United States, with approximately $12 billion in annual revenues as of 2017, and over $48 billion in assets. The company provides a wide range of energy-related products and services to its customers through its subsidiaries.
address: 4 IRVING PLACE, NEW YORK, NY, UNITED STATES, 10003
